product.product1Ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Coconut Oil, Shea Butter, Natural Fragrance.
product.product1Usage: Apply a small amount to dry or damp hair to style.
product.product2Ingredients: Plant Keratin, Aloe Vera, Argan Oil, Green Tea Extracts.
product.product2Usage: Massage into wet scalp, leave for 2 minutes, then rinse thoroughly.
product.product3Ingredients: Pro-vitamin B5, Natural Fixatives, Bamboo Extracts.
product.product3Usage: Distribute evenly through damp hair for long-lasting hold.
product.product4Ingredients: Citrus Extracts, Silk Proteins, Natural UV Filter.
product.product4Usage: Spray 20cm from hair to set the style without stiffening.
product.product5Ingredients: Avocado Oil, Cocoa Butter, Jojoba Oil, Vitamin E.
product.product5Usage: Apply to lengths after shampooing, leave for 5 minutes, rinse.
product.product6Ingredients: Castor Oil, Sweet Almond Oil, Cedar Oil, Vitamin E.
product.product6Usage: Apply a few drops to beard or hair ends daily.
